Common.reportSubmitted: Report submitted. Our team will review this location.
Common.reportReviewing: Our team is already reviewing this location
Common.selectAtLeastOneAlert: Select at least one weather alert, or turn alerts off.

Brand.tagline: Tracking The Weather Across Your World
Brand.description: Track current conditions and forecasts for the cities that matter to you — in your browser today, as an installable app tomorrow.
Brand.heroIntro: Check any city instantly, pin the ones you want to track, and get alerts when conditions change.

language.footerNote: UI strings ship for these languages. OpenWeather condition text follows the same locale when available.

Search.label: Search a location

archive.title: Location search
archive.description: Compare matching places on the map, then open the forecast that fits where you mean.
archive.hintWithQuery: Type a city, town, or place name and press Search.
archive.minChars: Enter at least 2 characters to search.

wrongLocation.title: Set your location
wrongLocation.description: Search for the place that matches where you are. We will remember it on this device for next time.

Search.sheetDescription: Search for a city or town, then open its forecast.

hero.shareLocationBody: Allow location above to see local conditions here.
hero.locationDenied: Location permission was blocked. Allow location in your browser settings, then try again.
hero.locationNeedsHttps: Location needs a secure (HTTPS) connection. Open this site over HTTPS, then try again.
hero.locationUnsupported: This browser does not support location.
hero.locationFailed: Could not read your location. Try again.

localCard.weatherLoadFailedNear: Near {label}, but weather could not load.
localCard.weatherLoadFailed: Local weather could not be loaded yet.

recentChecks.title: Around you
recentChecks.description: Nearby places and cities you have searched on this device.
recentChecks.nearYouDescription: Locations close to your home weather point.
recentChecks.nearYouEmpty: No nearby places available right now.
recentChecks.nearYouNeedLocation: Allow location to see weather near you.
recentChecks.popularSearchesEmpty: No popular searches yet. Search a city above to get started — cities you check appear here.
recentChecks.popularSearchesDescription: Places people look up most across meridian.

locations.title: Your locations
locations.description: Cities you have pinned from a check.
locations.emptyDescription: Search for a location, then pin it here to keep monitoring it on this device.

blog.title: From the meridian journal
blog.description: Short reads on forecasts, alerts, and getting more from the dashboard.

CityDetail.notFoundBody: Check a city from the dashboard search to view its forecast here.

options.rerunCheckDescription: Fetch the latest weather for this city
options.reportInaccurateDescription: Flag weather or forecast data that looks wrong
options.reportInaccurateActive: Our team is already reviewing this location
options.removeFromLocationsDescription: Unpin this city from your dashboard
options.pinToLocationsDescription: Save this city on your dashboard
options.emailOptionsManage: Manage platform-wide forecasts and weather alerts
options.emailOptionsGet: Get platform-wide forecasts and weather alerts
options.changeHeroImageDescription: Pick a different photo for this location

CityDetail.inaccurateBanner: A member of our team is looking into a report of inaccurate data. Please bear with us whilst we improve our weather and forecasts shown.

today.next12HoursDescription: Near-term temperature, rain chance, and wind.
today.next12HoursEmpty: Hourly points for the next stretch are still loading.

hourly.next12HoursDescription: One card per hour from now through the next twelve hours.
hourly.next12HoursEmpty: Hourly points for the next stretch are still loading.
hourly.dayChartDescription: Pick a day to graph temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity, or UV.

daily.title: 10-day outlook
daily.description: Tap a day with hourly detail to open charts. Later estimated days stay collapsed when that data is unavailable.
daily.unavailable: Daily forecast is not available yet.

history.title: History
history.description: Stored observations and archived hourly charts for past days at this location.
history.noData: Forecast data is not available yet.
history.noEntries: No history entries yet for this location. Checks you run will appear here over time.

hourly.title: Hourly forecast
hourly.description: Temperature, wind, and precipitation by hour.
hourly.empty: Hourly forecast is not available yet.

minute.title: Minute forecast
minute.description: Precipitation intensity for the next 60 minutes.

metrics.noChartData: No chart data for this day.

dialog.title: Email updates for {city}
dialog.description: Get a weekly forecast email (up to {limit} places) and optional weather alerts for this location.
dialog.weeklyHint: Include {city} in your weekly digest with your other places.
dialog.weeklyLimitHint: You’ve reached the limit of {limit} places for weekly forecasts.
dialog.alertsHint: Email when conditions match for this place.

alertPrefs.title: Weather alerts
alertPrefs.description: Per-city notifications when conditions match your choices.
alertPrefs.allHint: You’ll get every alert type we support for this place.
alertPrefs.disabledHint: Turn on weather alerts to choose all types or customise which ones you receive for this city.

removeCity.title: Remove {city}?
removeCity.hasSubscriptions: You receive email updates for this city. Do you also want to stop them?
removeCity.noSubscriptions: This city will be removed from your dashboard.

newsletter.description: Product updates and forecast features for meridianweather.co.uk.

banner.title: We use browser storage for your cities and preferences
banner.descriptionBefore: meridian stores essential data locally. Optional features include weather caching, precise location, and advertising. Read our

preferences.intro: Choose which optional storage and scripts meridian may use. Essential features such as saved cities and theme always remain enabled.
preferences.essentialDescription: Saved cities, client ID, theme, and core app state required to run meridian.
preferences.functionalDescription: Weather cache for faster loads and optional precise device location for search ranking.
preferences.analyticsDescription: Reserved for anonymous usage insights. Enabled only when you opt in.
preferences.advertisingDescription: Google AdSense on the free tier. Google may set third-party cookies when enabled.
preferences.marketingDescription: Reserved for future promotional communications. Not used in v1.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage cookies and accessibility options for meridian on this device.

accessibility.intro: Adjust display and interaction settings for this device. Changes apply immediately and are saved in your browser.
accessibility.colourSchemeDescription: Choose light, dark, or follow your operating system preference.
accessibility.motionDescription: Reduce animations and auto-advancing carousels when enabled.
accessibility.textSizeDescription: Scale interface text across the site.
accessibility.highContrastDescription: Increase contrast for text, borders, and focus states.
accessibility.underlineLinksDescription: Always underline text links for easier scanning.
accessibility.enhancedFocusDescription: Show stronger focus rings on keyboard navigation.
accessibility.readableFontDescription: Use a system sans-serif stack optimised for legibility.
accessibility.skipLinkDescription: Show a keyboard-accessible skip link at the top of each page.

adFree.title: Browse without ads
adFree.description: Support Meridian and hide advertising on this device. No Meridian account required — Stripe uses your email.
adFree.comingSoon: Stripe checkout will activate once billing keys are configured on the server.
adFree.restoreSent: If a license exists, a restore link is on its way.

archive.title: Meridian journal
archive.description: All posts — forecasts, product notes, and guides for getting more from the weather dashboard.

post.commentsDescription: Share a note about this article. Comments stay on this device for the demo — they are not synced to a server.
post.commentsEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first to leave one.
post.commentsValidation: Please add a name (2+ characters) and a short comment.
post.schemaDescription: Related pages in the meridian documentation and journal.

Docs.title: meridian documentation
Docs.description: Guides for using the dashboard, subscriptions, and API behaviour.

Monetization.placeholderOverlay: Adsense Location: Adverts will go here on live website.

Seo.homeDescription: Track current conditions and forecasts for the cities that matter to you — in your browser today, as an installable app tomorrow.
Seo.homeIntro: meridian is a multi-city weather dashboard for tracking live conditions, short-range forecasts, and optional email alerts across the places that matter to you.
Seo.docsDescription: Guides for using the meridian dashboard, forecasts, subscriptions, and API behaviour.
Seo.cityForecastDescription: {summary} in {city}, {country} — 7-day forecast and live conditions on meridian.
Seo.cityForecastFallback: Track current conditions and forecasts for {city}, {country} on meridian.
Seo.notFoundDescription: The page you requested could not be found on meridian.
Seo.searchDescription: Search cities and places worldwide on meridian.
Seo.journalDescription: Guides and notes on forecasts, alerts, and using meridian.
Seo.weatherPlaceDescription: What is the weather like in {city}? Live conditions, hourly and 10-day forecast for {city}, {region}.
Seo.weatherPlaceDescriptionWithSummary: What is the weather like in {city}? {summary}. Live forecast for {city}, {region} on meridian.
Seo.weatherPlaceLede: What is the weather like in {city} today? Check live conditions, hourly detail, and the 10-day outlook for {city}, {region}.
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqWhatLikeQ: What is the weather like in {city}?
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqWhatLikeA: Right now in {city}, {country}: {summary}. Updated throughout the day on meridian.
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqWhatLikeAFallback: See live conditions and the forecast for {city}, {country} on this page.
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqForecastQ: What is the weather forecast for {city}?
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqForecastA: meridian shows hourly and 10-day forecasts for {city}, with temperature, rain, wind, and more.
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqShortQ: Weather {city} — where can I check it?
Seo.weatherPlaceFaqShortA: This page is the meridian weather page for {city}: short-form Weather {city} and long-form questions about conditions in {city}.

Errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have moved.
Errors.errorBody: meridian hit an unexpected error. Try again or return to the dashboard.
